text: Jabse unhone kaha ki shehar aakar main badal gayi hoon, mere sar mein aisa bhari-pan rehne laga hai jaise koi lohe ki hatheli dabba rahi ho. MNC ka kaam aur ghar ki zimmedari ke dual burden se pehle hi thakan thi, par ab ye chest tightness sone nahi deti. 'Mard nahi rota' sunte huye badi hui hoon toh rona toh nahi aata, bas gale mein kuch atka sa rehta hai.

Partner ka ye kehna ki main 'badal' gayi hoon, mere pet mein ajeeb si jalan aur acidity paida kar raha hai. Office ki suppressed ambition aur 'achi bahu' banne ka bojh kandhon mein itni jakdan deta hai ki laptop pe baithna mushkil ho gaya hai. Main chup rehti hoon taaki ghar ki izzat bani rahe, par ye sharir ki tootan kisi ko kaise dikhau?

Uski baatein sunkar dimaag ki nasein phatne lagti hain aur poore sharir mein ajeeb si kampann hoti hai. Working woman hone ka guilt aur ghar ka kalesh itna badh gaya hai ki ab saans lene mein bhi takleef hoti hai. Main emotionally kamzor nahi dikhna chahti kyunki samaj kya kahega, isliye bas migraine ki painkiller kha kar din nikaal rahi hoon.

Jab usne badalne ki baat ki, meri raaton ki neend ud gayi aur peeth mein hamesha ek chubhan rehti hai. Career aur ghar ke dual role mein itna thak gayi hoon ki ab aankhon mein hamesha jalan rehti hai. 'Mard nahi rota' wali sakhti mujh par bhi hai, isliye bas doctor ko bolti hoon ki shayad mausam badalne se badan dard ho raha hai.

Uske tanno ke baad se mera dum ghutne laga hai aur hatheliyon mein hamesha paseena rehta hai. Main bas sabka khayal rakhna chahti hoon par ye sar dard itna shiddat ka hai ki office ki file tak nahi khul rahi. Log kahenge ki career ke liye bahu nakhre kar rahi hai, par ye dil ki ghabrahat sharir mein dard bankar nikal rahi hai.
